mechanism_narrative: Sustained declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in employment conditions signals an approaching recession, causing investors to price in lower future corporate profits and negative equity returns.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.5 percentage points within 3 months
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the rising unemployment signal.

mechanism_narrative: When manufacturing output contracts simultaneously with a sharp drop in new housing starts, it indicates a synchronized demand-supply shock that severely compresses corporate margins and equity valuations.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below 100 and HOUST falls below 1200
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns when either INDPRO or HOUST remains above historical medians.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation environment, rising consumer credit balances indicate unsustainable consumption that will eventually face a credit crunch, leading to negative equity returns once the Fed tightens policy.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive when RSAFS rises alongside CPIAUCSL above the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Continuous growth in real GDP expands the aggregate earnings base for S&P 500 constituents, driving positive forward equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in GDP-growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds a critical threshold, borrowing costs suppress corporate investment and consumer spending, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS remains above the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising unemployment and falling industrial production indicates a broad-based economic contraction that erodes corporate revenue growth, leading to negative equity returns over a monthly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns when PAYEMS stabilizes while INDPRO continues to fall.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of supply chain stress, a sustained decline in industrial production combined with sticky inflation forces the Fed to maintain restrictive policy, suppressing equity valuations over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below 100 for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive when INDPRO declines alongside CPIAUCSL above the threshold.
